Go to the **Preview** tab and pick the sub-template that matches your publication:

* [New Paper](?expand=1&template=new_paper.md&labels=status:%20first%20review&title=Short+description+of+the+paper) — journal articles, White Papers, Research Notes, reports, books/reviews (classes a, b, d, g)
* [New Software / Data](?expand=1&template=new_software.md&labels=status:%20first%20review&title=Short+description+of+the+deliverable) — versioned software, data releases, docs (class e)

Class c (LSST web resources) and class f (non-peer-reviewed conference contributions): use **New Paper** and set the Class field on the cover page accordingly.

The review is conducted **inside the Pull Request**, per the ISSC Publication Review Manual (v1.0). Registering intent first? See the optional [publication registration issue](?template=register-publication.md) — but note the registration/assignment step normally happens by email or Slack to PubCom.
